short_text: Shami to Trumpelmann, 1 run, another slot ball and Shami gets away with it. Trumpelmann heaves across the line and gets
full_text: Shami to Trumpelmann, 1 run, another slot ball and Shami gets away with it. Trumpelmann heaves across the line and gets it off the inner half to deep backward square, the ball almost went past the fielder but he did well to gather it with one hand

short_text: Shami to Trumpelmann, 2 runs, very full and close to yorker length, Trumpelmann digs it backward of square leg and races
full_text: Shami to Trumpelmann, 2 runs, very full and close to yorker length, Trumpelmann digs it backward of square leg and races back for the second

short_text: Shami to Trumpelmann, , has Rahul injured himself? Terrific effort to take the catch, but he landed badly on his shoulde
full_text: Shami to Trumpelmann, , has Rahul injured himself? Terrific effort to take the catch, but he landed badly on his shoulder. He looks fine and is still out in the field. Slower ball dug into the surface, Trumpelmann smacks it flat to the right of long-on, Rahul runs across and dives, gets fingertips but the ball escapes his grasp and rolls into the fence

short_text: Shami to Trumpelmann, , this time Trumpelmann connects and he clears long-on. This is a slot ball and Trumpelmann used t
full_text: Shami to Trumpelmann, , this time Trumpelmann connects and he clears long-on. This is a slot ball and Trumpelmann used the long handle to perfection, swings it high and gets it over the leaping long-on fielder

short_text: Shami to Trumpelmann, no run, now the short ball outside off, Trumpelmann has a swing across the line and the ball flies
full_text: Shami to Trumpelmann, no run, now the short ball outside off, Trumpelmann has a swing across the line and the ball flies over the top-edge

short_text: Shami to Trumpelmann, no run, missed out there. Juicy knee high full toss and Trumpelmann fails to connect, the ball thu
full_text: Shami to Trumpelmann, no run, missed out there. Juicy knee high full toss and Trumpelmann fails to connect, the ball thuds into the pad and rolls back to Shami

short_text: Bumrah to Jan Frylinck, 2 runs, low full toss on the pads, Frylinck flicks it wide of deep mid-wicket and scampers back
full_text: Bumrah to Jan Frylinck, 2 runs, low full toss on the pads, Frylinck flicks it wide of deep mid-wicket and scampers back for the second

short_text: Bumrah to Wiese, Caught by Rohit!! That's a well-disguised slower ball. Wiese jumped out of the crease but the ball dipp
full_text: Bumrah to Wiese, Caught by Rohit!! That's a well-disguised slower ball. Wiese jumped out of the crease but the ball dipped on him, he scoops it straight up and Rohit settles under it near extra cover, takes it calmly.

short_text: Bumrah to Jan Frylinck, 1 run, slower delivery angled in, Frylinck eases it in front of long-on and wants a second, but
full_text: Bumrah to Jan Frylinck, 1 run, slower delivery angled in, Frylinck eases it in front of long-on and wants a second, but is sent back

short_text: Bumrah to Jan Frylinck, no run, Everyone sees the funny side of it. Yorker length and Frylinck jams it back towards the
full_text: Bumrah to Jan Frylinck, no run, Everyone sees the funny side of it. Yorker length and Frylinck jams it back towards the bowler, Bumrah sticks his right hand out and stops the ball, Frylinck was miles thinking he had got it past Bumrah and even gave up as the throw went past the stumps. Bumrah had three stumps to aim and he couldn't hit the target

short_text: Bumrah to Jan Frylinck, , slower delivery sprayed down leg, Frylinck has no chance to connect with the glance and the ba
full_text: Bumrah to Jan Frylinck, , slower delivery sprayed down leg, Frylinck has no chance to connect with the glance and the ball goes on the bounce to Pant

short_text: Bumrah to Jan Frylinck, no run, makes room and Bumrah goes short, Frylinck tries to ramp it over point but the pace is t
full_text: Bumrah to Jan Frylinck, no run, makes room and Bumrah goes short, Frylinck tries to ramp it over point but the pace is too hot to handle, umpire Richard Illingworth signals one for the over

short_text: Bumrah to Wiese, 1 run, spears it into the blockhole, Wiese jams it to deep mid-wicket and wants a second, sent back and
full_text: Bumrah to Wiese, 1 run, spears it into the blockhole, Wiese jams it to deep mid-wicket and wants a second, sent back and he's lucky to survive. Kohli has a shy and didn't miss the stumps by much

short_text: Shami to Jan Frylinck, 2 runs, slower delivery outside off, Frylinck opens the bat face and directs it behind square on
full_text: Shami to Jan Frylinck, 2 runs, slower delivery outside off, Frylinck opens the bat face and directs it behind square on the off-side, two more

short_text: Shami to Wiese, 3 runs, steps out and is met by a fine yorker, somehow managed to dig it out past mid-wicket and there's
full_text: Shami to Wiese, 3 runs, steps out and is met by a fine yorker, somehow managed to dig it out past mid-wicket and there's no one in the deep, easy three

short_text: Shami to Jan Frylinck, 5 runs, some more bonus runs for Namibia. Frylinck drops it in front of backward point and Wiese
full_text: Shami to Jan Frylinck, 5 runs, some more bonus runs for Namibia. Frylinck drops it in front of backward point and Wiese decides to take on Jadeja, there's a shy at the striker's end and it is not on target. There was no one backing up nor able to stop the Jadeja's bullet throw

short_text: Shami to Jan Frylinck, no run, bouncer angled into the left hander, Frylinck ducks and sways away from the line of the d
full_text: Shami to Jan Frylinck, no run, bouncer angled into the left hander, Frylinck ducks and sways away from the line of the delivery

short_text: Shami to Wiese, 1 run, attacks the stumps with a fullish delivery, Wiese eases it to long-on
full_text: Shami to Wiese, 1 run, attacks the stumps with a fullish delivery, Wiese eases it to long-on

short_text: Shami to Jan Frylinck, 1 run, arrows it full from round the wicket, clipped to deep square leg
full_text: Shami to Jan Frylinck, 1 run, arrows it full from round the wicket, clipped to deep square leg

short_text: Bumrah to Jan Frylinck, 1 run, on a length and outside off, Frylinck drives to sweeper cover
full_text: Bumrah to Jan Frylinck, 1 run, on a length and outside off, Frylinck drives to sweeper cover

short_text: Bumrah to Jan Frylinck, no run, short ball angled across the left hander, Frylinck drops his gloves and sways out of the
full_text: Bumrah to Jan Frylinck, no run, short ball angled across the left hander, Frylinck drops his gloves and sways out of the line

short_text: Bumrah to Jan Frylinck, leg byes, , wrong line from Bumrah. The slower delivery down leg, Frylinck misses the glance but
full_text: Bumrah to Jan Frylinck, leg byes, , wrong line from Bumrah. The slower delivery down leg, Frylinck misses the glance but the ball takes a slight deflection off the pad, gently rolls to the fine leg fence, beating Chahar

short_text: Bumrah to Jan Frylinck, 2 runs, very full delivery on leg-stump, jammed out backward of square leg and Frylinck scampers
full_text: Bumrah to Jan Frylinck, 2 runs, very full delivery on leg-stump, jammed out backward of square leg and Frylinck scampers back for the second, placed it wide enough of SKY to pick the extra run

short_text: Bumrah to Jan Frylinck, no run, back of a length around off, Frylinck knocks it back to Bumrah
full_text: Bumrah to Jan Frylinck, no run, back of a length around off, Frylinck knocks it back to Bumrah

short_text: Bumrah to Jan Frylinck, no run, starts with a slower delivery across off, Frylinck has tentative poke and is beaten on t
full_text: Bumrah to Jan Frylinck, no run, starts with a slower delivery across off, Frylinck has tentative poke and is beaten on the outside edge

short_text: Ashwin to Wiese, no run, slower and turning in, Wiese prods forward and inside halves the block to the on-side. Ashwin t
full_text: Ashwin to Wiese, no run, slower and turning in, Wiese prods forward and inside halves the block to the on-side. Ashwin too has a good outing with the ball, he finishes with

short_text: Ashwin to Jan Frylinck, 1 run, very full delivery outside off and Frylinck manages to squeeze it out to sweeper cover
full_text: Ashwin to Jan Frylinck, 1 run, very full delivery outside off and Frylinck manages to squeeze it out to sweeper cover

short_text: Ashwin to Zane Green, Bowled!! Whoa! This is just too good for Green. It has been too good for some of the renowned left
full_text: Ashwin to Zane Green, Bowled!! Whoa! This is just too good for Green. It has been too good for some of the renowned left hand batters and Green stood no chance against Ashwin's guile. Tossed up from round the wicket, the drift draws Green into the forward block but the turn beats him neck and crop, the ball hits the top of middle-stump. That was an Ashwin special!

short_text: Ashwin to Wiese, 1 run, flattish delivery around off, Wiese punches to sweeper cover
full_text: Ashwin to Wiese, 1 run, flattish delivery around off, Wiese punches to sweeper cover

short_text: Ashwin to Wiese, no run, uhhh! An inside edge saved Wiese there. He played down the wrong line, was pushing outside the
full_text: Ashwin to Wiese, no run, uhhh! An inside edge saved Wiese there. He played down the wrong line, was pushing outside the line and the edge deflected onto the back pad. He was a goner if not for the bit of wood

short_text: Ashwin to Wiese, no run, carrom ball on off, Wiese turns it watchfully to mid-wicket
full_text: Ashwin to Wiese, no run, carrom ball on off, Wiese turns it watchfully to mid-wicket

short_text: Jadeja to Smit, Caught by Rohit!! Fine take by Rohit. Another 3-fer for Jadeja. Touch slower and enticing Smit into the
full_text: Jadeja to Smit, Caught by Rohit!! Fine take by Rohit. Another 3-fer for Jadeja. Touch slower and enticing Smit into the drive, but the ball dips and he ends up spooning it towards cover, Rohit dives forward and takes it inches from the ground. Jadeja is done with his spell and he finishesn with impressive figures

short_text: Jadeja to Smit, no run, drifting into the right hander, pushed back to Jadeja
full_text: Jadeja to Smit, no run, drifting into the right hander, pushed back to Jadeja

short_text: Jadeja to Wiese, 1 run, shortens the length around off, Wiese knocks it square past point, for a single
full_text: Jadeja to Wiese, 1 run, shortens the length around off, Wiese knocks it square past point, for a single

short_text: Jadeja to Wiese, no run, quicker and arrowing in on off, Wiese defends to cover
full_text: Jadeja to Wiese, no run, quicker and arrowing in on off, Wiese defends to cover

short_text: Jadeja to Smit, 1 run, wicket to wicket stuff, Smit works it into the mid-wicket pocket and Jadeja himself tidies up
full_text: Jadeja to Smit, 1 run, wicket to wicket stuff, Smit works it into the mid-wicket pocket and Jadeja himself tidies up

short_text: Jadeja to Wiese, 1 run, flatter and close to off, Wiese punches to sweeper cover
full_text: Jadeja to Wiese, 1 run, flatter and close to off, Wiese punches to sweeper cover

short_text: Rahul Chahar to Smit, , in the air and past Rohit. Chahar dangles the carrot outside off and Smit takes the bait, goes f
full_text: Rahul Chahar to Smit, , in the air and past Rohit. Chahar dangles the carrot outside off and Smit takes the bait, goes for the drive and the outside edge flies past the outstretched hand of Rohit at slip

short_text: Rahul Chahar to Wiese, 1 run, quicker and skidding on, Wiese is rushed on the pull and miscues to long-on
full_text: Rahul Chahar to Wiese, 1 run, quicker and skidding on, Wiese is rushed on the pull and miscues to long-on

short_text: Rahul Chahar to Wiese, , , drops it short and offers width, Wiese cracks it square through the point region and the ball
full_text: Rahul Chahar to Wiese, , , drops it short and offers width, Wiese cracks it square through the point region and the ball keeps going away from the sweeper. Chahar has overstepped.. Trying too many things as he bowled this ball whilst coming in between the umpire and wicket

short_text: Rahul Chahar to Smit, 1 run, tossed up around off, Smit eases it wide of cover and crosses over
full_text: Rahul Chahar to Smit, 1 run, tossed up around off, Smit eases it wide of cover and crosses over

short_text: Rahul Chahar to Wiese, 1 run, flatter and fraction short, punched to sweeper cover
full_text: Rahul Chahar to Wiese, 1 run, flatter and fraction short, punched to sweeper cover

short_text: Rahul Chahar to Smit, 1 run, low dipping full toss and Smit drives to long-off
full_text: Rahul Chahar to Smit, 1 run, low dipping full toss and Smit drives to long-off

short_text: Rahul Chahar to Smit, no run, flighted outside off, Smit slices the drive to backward point
full_text: Rahul Chahar to Smit, no run, flighted outside off, Smit slices the drive to backward point

short_text: Ashwin to Smit, 1 run, quicker and skidding on, Smit chops it square on the off-side and retains strike
full_text: Ashwin to Smit, 1 run, quicker and skidding on, Smit chops it square on the off-side and retains strike

short_text: Ashwin to Wiese, 3 runs, carrom ball drifts down leg, Wiese tickles it fine and it was only two, but Kishan runs across
full_text: Ashwin to Wiese, 3 runs, carrom ball drifts down leg, Wiese tickles it fine and it was only two, but Kishan runs across and fails to gather the ball, conceding the extra run

short_text: Ashwin to Smit, 1 run, carrom ball around off, Smit knocks it square past the point region
full_text: Ashwin to Smit, 1 run, carrom ball around off, Smit knocks it square past the point region

short_text: Ashwin to Erasmus, Caught by Pant!! Such a soft dismissal. No appeal, no celebration, just the umpire's finger going up.
full_text: Ashwin to Erasmus, Caught by Pant!! Such a soft dismissal. No appeal, no celebration, just the umpire's finger going up. The offbreak that skids on and deceives Erasmus into a false stroke, he thought it was there for the cut but the pace slid on to take the outside edge, Pant makes no mistake and Namibia have lost their skipper.

short_text: Ashwin to Erasmus, , bonus runs for Namibia. Ashwin went wide of the crease to get drift on the carrom ball, but the bal
full_text: Ashwin to Erasmus, , bonus runs for Namibia. Ashwin went wide of the crease to get drift on the carrom ball, but the ball kept going with the angle and Pant couldn't get across to glove it

short_text: Ashwin to Erasmus, no run, once more steps out and this time the carrom ball keeps low, jabbed back to Ashwin
full_text: Ashwin to Erasmus, no run, once more steps out and this time the carrom ball keeps low, jabbed back to Ashwin

short_text: Ashwin to Erasmus, no run, comes down the track and is met by a carrom ball, closes the bat face and the leading edge ro
full_text: Ashwin to Erasmus, no run, comes down the track and is met by a carrom ball, closes the bat face and the leading edge rolls towards cover, Kohli puts in a dive to his left and denies the batters a single

short_text: Jadeja to Erasmus, 1 run, brilliant work from Jadeja. Erasmus inside halves the forward block to square leg and the pair
full_text: Jadeja to Erasmus, 1 run, brilliant work from Jadeja. Erasmus inside halves the forward block to square leg and the pair was looking for the second, but Jadeja runs all the way across and keeps it to a single. He outran Pant there

short_text: Jadeja to Wiese, 1 run, slower and bit of away turn, eased to sweeper cover
full_text: Jadeja to Wiese, 1 run, slower and bit of away turn, eased to sweeper cover

short_text: Jadeja to Wiese, 2 runs, sliding on with the angle, Wiese works it into the empty space at mid-wicket and scampers back
full_text: Jadeja to Wiese, 2 runs, sliding on with the angle, Wiese works it into the empty space at mid-wicket and scampers back for the second

short_text: Jadeja to Wiese, no run, skiddy arm-ball that slides on, Wiese brings his bat down and chops it to backward point
full_text: Jadeja to Wiese, no run, skiddy arm-ball that slides on, Wiese brings his bat down and chops it to backward point

short_text: Jadeja to Wiese, no run, drifting into the right hander, pushed off the inner half back to Jadeja
full_text: Jadeja to Wiese, no run, drifting into the right hander, pushed off the inner half back to Jadeja

short_text: Jadeja to Erasmus, 1 run, flatter and around off, Erasmus knocks it into the off-side and crosses over
full_text: Jadeja to Erasmus, 1 run, flatter and around off, Erasmus knocks it into the off-side and crosses over

short_text: Rahul Chahar to Wiese, , streaky! There was a slip for Wiese when he faced his first ball against Chahar but removed soo
full_text: Rahul Chahar to Wiese, , streaky! There was a slip for Wiese when he faced his first ball against Chahar but removed soon after. This ball goes straight through that area. Teased up and Wiese takes the bait, drives and the outside edge flies past the empty slip region

short_text: Rahul Chahar to Erasmus, 1 run, slower and touch fuller, Erasmus gloves the reverse sweep towards short third
full_text: Rahul Chahar to Erasmus, 1 run, slower and touch fuller, Erasmus gloves the reverse sweep towards short third

short_text: Rahul Chahar to Erasmus, , this time the short ball is punished. It was a long hop and Erasmus picked the bones out of t
full_text: Rahul Chahar to Erasmus, , this time the short ball is punished. It was a long hop and Erasmus picked the bones out of that, he rocked back and nailed the pull in front of square, no chance for deep mid-wicket

short_text: Rahul Chahar to Wiese, 1 run, drops it fraction short, Wiese chops it in front of sweeper cover
full_text: Rahul Chahar to Wiese, 1 run, drops it fraction short, Wiese chops it in front of sweeper cover

short_text: Rahul Chahar to Erasmus, 1 run, floated up outside off, Erasmus slices it through the vacant backward point region, just
full_text: Rahul Chahar to Erasmus, 1 run, floated up outside off, Erasmus slices it through the vacant backward point region, just a single

short_text: Rahul Chahar to Erasmus, no run, flighted outside off, Erasmus drives straight to short cover
full_text: Rahul Chahar to Erasmus, no run, flighted outside off, Erasmus drives straight to short cover

short_text: Ashwin to Wiese, no run, a terrible full-toss, but he's driven it straight to the man at cover!
full_text: Ashwin to Wiese, no run, a terrible full-toss, but he's driven it straight to the man at cover!

short_text: Ashwin to Wiese, no run, carom ball! He's spun that past the pushing, clueless outside edge through to Pant, past the of
full_text: Ashwin to Wiese, no run, carom ball! He's spun that past the pushing, clueless outside edge through to Pant, past the off-stump

short_text: Ashwin to Erasmus, 1 run, gets forward and defends this in front of point for a quick single
full_text: Ashwin to Erasmus, 1 run, gets forward and defends this in front of point for a quick single

short_text: Ashwin to Wiese, 1 run, punches this hastily off the backfoot square of the wicket for one
full_text: Ashwin to Wiese, 1 run, punches this hastily off the backfoot square of the wicket for one

short_text: Ashwin to Wiese, leg byes, 2 runs, into the pads, and that's tickled down to fine leg for a couple
full_text: Ashwin to Wiese, leg byes, 2 runs, into the pads, and that's tickled down to fine leg for a couple

short_text: Ashwin to Loftie-Eaton, Caught by Rohit!! This is a Test match wicket! He's gotten him to press forward with the flight,
full_text: Ashwin to Loftie-Eaton, Caught by Rohit!! This is a Test match wicket! He's gotten him to press forward with the flight, but the sudden dip forces Loftie-Eaton back, and he attempts a hasty late-cut, edging it straight to Rohit at slip. Namibia have lost another!

short_text: Rahul Chahar to Erasmus, no run, loopy leg-break outside off, Erasmus gets on his knee and attempts to drag this from th
full_text: Rahul Chahar to Erasmus, no run, loopy leg-break outside off, Erasmus gets on his knee and attempts to drag this from the line and mow it over cow corner for six, but misses it completely...

short_text: Rahul Chahar to Loftie-Eaton, 1 run, loopy and full on the legs, and that's worked away behind square leg for a single
full_text: Rahul Chahar to Loftie-Eaton, 1 run, loopy and full on the legs, and that's worked away behind square leg for a single

short_text: Rahul Chahar to Erasmus, 1 run, shorter one on the gut, and that's pulled down to deep backward square leg for a single
full_text: Rahul Chahar to Erasmus, 1 run, shorter one on the gut, and that's pulled down to deep backward square leg for a single

short_text: Rahul Chahar to Erasmus, no run, reaches out to a loopy wide one and crunches a drive to the man at cover
full_text: Rahul Chahar to Erasmus, no run, reaches out to a loopy wide one and crunches a drive to the man at cover

short_text: Rahul Chahar to Loftie-Eaton, 1 run, pokes this to point and they get across for another single! Namibia putting the pre
full_text: Rahul Chahar to Loftie-Eaton, 1 run, pokes this to point and they get across for another single! Namibia putting the pressure on India with quick running!

short_text: Rahul Chahar to Loftie-Eaton, 2 runs, works this one off the pads to backward square leg for a single, oh no, they're go
full_text: Rahul Chahar to Loftie-Eaton, 2 runs, works this one off the pads to backward square leg for a single, oh no, they're going across for another! Reckless stuff from Namibia, and a better throw would have accounted for Loftie-Eaton!

short_text: Jadeja to Erasmus, 2 runs, gets across in panic attempting the lap-sweep without reading it out of the hand, gets a mass
full_text: Jadeja to Erasmus, 2 runs, gets across in panic attempting the lap-sweep without reading it out of the hand, gets a massive top-edge with the overspin over the keeper and slip towards long stop for a couple

short_text: Jadeja to Loftie-Eaton, 1 run, fuller length and flat one outside off, driven down firmly to long-off for one
full_text: Jadeja to Loftie-Eaton, 1 run, fuller length and flat one outside off, driven down firmly to long-off for one

short_text: Jadeja to Baard, Lbw!! He's been given LBW! Fired flat at the leg-stump, Baard attempts the sweep, is struck on the pads
full_text: Jadeja to Baard, Lbw!! He's been given LBW! Fired flat at the leg-stump, Baard attempts the sweep, is struck on the pads. , flat line. He's shuffled across to play this sweep, so we might have this one hitting. Yup, three reds - impact in line, and . Another man down for Namibia.

short_text: Jadeja to Baard, no run, backs away into the on-side, and drives this inside out with the spin straight to cover
full_text: Jadeja to Baard, no run, backs away into the on-side, and drives this inside out with the spin straight to cover

short_text: Jadeja to Baard, , gets on one knee, Jadeja pitches it short, and plays a bit of a pull on his knee to backward square l
full_text: Jadeja to Baard, , gets on one knee, Jadeja pitches it short, and plays a bit of a pull on his knee to backward square leg for four

short_text: Jadeja to Baard, no run, flat and full, drilled back to the bowler
full_text: Jadeja to Baard, no run, flat and full, drilled back to the bowler

short_text: Rahul Chahar to Erasmus, no run, skids through on off-stump, Erasmus hangs back and defends hastily
full_text: Rahul Chahar to Erasmus, no run, skids through on off-stump, Erasmus hangs back and defends hastily

short_text: Rahul Chahar to Erasmus, no run, pushes a fuller on towards cover off the frontfoot
full_text: Rahul Chahar to Erasmus, no run, pushes a fuller on towards cover off the frontfoot

short_text: Rahul Chahar to Erasmus, no run, inveigled into the forward whip-drive by the flight, nearly drags his foot out and is b
full_text: Rahul Chahar to Erasmus, no run, inveigled into the forward whip-drive by the flight, nearly drags his foot out and is beaten on the outside edge, and Pant whips off the bails. Easily in though..

short_text: Rahul Chahar to Baard, 1 run, loopy outside off, Baard gets across and sweeps it all along the ground to deep square leg
full_text: Rahul Chahar to Baard, 1 run, loopy outside off, Baard gets across and sweeps it all along the ground to deep square leg for a single

short_text: Rahul Chahar to Baard, no run, full and wide, Baard reaches out to drive and misses, Pant whips the bails off but the fo
full_text: Rahul Chahar to Baard, no run, full and wide, Baard reaches out to drive and misses, Pant whips the bails off but the foot is grounded.

short_text: Rahul Chahar to Baard, no run, drama! Baard gets across and attempts a sweep to a shorter one, gets a glove that lobs ov
full_text: Rahul Chahar to Baard, no run, drama! Baard gets across and attempts a sweep to a shorter one, gets a glove that lobs over Pant who's trying to catch it and Rohit at slips falls over trying to catch that too, but misses out...

short_text: Jadeja to Erasmus, no run, defends another flat skidder on off towards cover
full_text: Jadeja to Erasmus, no run, defends another flat skidder on off towards cover

short_text: Jadeja to Erasmus, no run, skids through on off-stump, Erasmus punches it back off the backfoot
full_text: Jadeja to Erasmus, no run, skids through on off-stump, Erasmus punches it back off the backfoot

short_text: Jadeja to Erasmus, no run, flat and angling in towards off, Erasmus deadbats
full_text: Jadeja to Erasmus, no run, flat and angling in towards off, Erasmus deadbats

short_text: Jadeja to Craig Williams, Stumped!! He's charged Jadeja far too early and Jadeja has been around for far too long to com
full_text: Jadeja to Craig Williams, Stumped!! He's charged Jadeja far too early and Jadeja has been around for far too long to come second in one of these Indian spin roulettes. Pulls the length back and it skids through, Craig Williams misses the attempted glance and Pant collects it, flicking off the bails after a spiteful pause, given how far down Craig Williams was.

short_text: Jadeja to Craig Williams, no run, angling in very full on off, driven inside out to short cover
full_text: Jadeja to Craig Williams, no run, angling in very full on off, driven inside out to short cover

short_text: Jadeja to Baard, 1 run, drive a slow, flat one outside off to deep extra cover for a single
full_text: Jadeja to Baard, 1 run, drive a slow, flat one outside off to deep extra cover for a single

short_text: Bumrah to Craig Williams, no run, slows off a length, Craig Williams checks a drive from the crease towards mid-on
full_text: Bumrah to Craig Williams, no run, slows off a length, Craig Williams checks a drive from the crease towards mid-on

short_text: Bumrah to Craig Williams, no run, short of length ball outside off, Craig Williams hops and drops it into the off-side
full_text: Bumrah to Craig Williams, no run, short of length ball outside off, Craig Williams hops and drops it into the off-side

short_text: Bumrah to Michael van Lingen, Caught by Shami!! There it is! That's stopped off a back of a length, a bit of width on of
full_text: Bumrah to Michael van Lingen, Caught by Shami!! There it is! That's stopped off a back of a length, a bit of width on offer too, and banged in at 136kmph, Michael van Lingen gets overambitious and tries to flat-bat this over mid-off, but ends up mistiming this straight to Shami at mid-off. That's the end of van Lingen, and India have drawn first blood.

short_text: Bumrah to Baard, 1 run, short ball at the body, Baard swivels into a pull shot to backward square leg for a single
full_text: Bumrah to Baard, 1 run, short ball at the body, Baard swivels into a pull shot to backward square leg for a single

short_text: Bumrah to Baard, no run, vicious bumper, 134kmph but looked a lot quicker, Baard nearly ducks into it blindly, but that
full_text: Bumrah to Baard, no run, vicious bumper, 134kmph but looked a lot quicker, Baard nearly ducks into it blindly, but that has done no harm

short_text: Bumrah to Michael van Lingen, 1 run, swats a 136kmph length ball from middle and off towards mid-wicket for a single
full_text: Bumrah to Michael van Lingen, 1 run, swats a 136kmph length ball from middle and off towards mid-wicket for a single

short_text: Ashwin to Baard, 2 runs, works this with the inward angle off the frontfoot to deep mid-wicket for a couple
full_text: Ashwin to Baard, 2 runs, works this with the inward angle off the frontfoot to deep mid-wicket for a couple

short_text: Ashwin to Baard, no run, shaping up for the reverse-sweep, massive wide down leg, but that's not been given because the
full_text: Ashwin to Baard, no run, shaping up for the reverse-sweep, massive wide down leg, but that's not been given because the batsman had set up for the reverse-sweep!

short_text: Ashwin to Michael van Lingen, 1 run, flatter one into the thigh, and that's tucked off the backfoot to deep mid-wicket f
full_text: Ashwin to Michael van Lingen, 1 run, flatter one into the thigh, and that's tucked off the backfoot to deep mid-wicket for one

short_text: Ashwin to Michael van Lingen, 2 runs, charges down the track to the pitch of it and mistimes the lofted drive over the b
full_text: Ashwin to Michael van Lingen, 2 runs, charges down the track to the pitch of it and mistimes the lofted drive over the bowler straight down the ground for a couple

short_text: Ashwin to Michael van Lingen, no run, zips through on off-stump, Michael van Lingen leans in and pushes this to cover
full_text: Ashwin to Michael van Lingen, no run, zips through on off-stump, Michael van Lingen leans in and pushes this to cover

short_text: Ashwin to Baard, 1 run, Ashwin starts off with a slightly shorter one than he intended, and that's whipped away from out
full_text: Ashwin to Baard, 1 run, Ashwin starts off with a slightly shorter one than he intended, and that's whipped away from outside off to long-on for one

short_text: Shami to Michael van Lingen, no run, full and wide on the tramline, Michael van Lingen has another go at the cover drive
full_text: Shami to Michael van Lingen, no run, full and wide on the tramline, Michael van Lingen has another go at the cover drive, misses

short_text: Shami to Michael van Lingen, no run, round the wicket, wide yorker length ball at 141kmph, Michael van Lingen tries lean
full_text: Shami to Michael van Lingen, no run, round the wicket, wide yorker length ball at 141kmph, Michael van Lingen tries leaning in and squeezing it away through point, but misses it completely

short_text: Shami to Baard, 1 run, into the hip again, and that's tucked away off the backfoot to deep backward square leg for a sin
full_text: Shami to Baard, 1 run, into the hip again, and that's tucked away off the backfoot to deep backward square leg for a single

short_text: Shami to Baard, 2 runs, pushed onto the backfoot by a back of a length ball, and that's worked away off the backfoot to
full_text: Shami to Baard, 2 runs, pushed onto the backfoot by a back of a length ball, and that's worked away off the backfoot to mid-wicket for a couple

short_text: Shami to Baard, , that is I0$! It's a half-volley alright, but he's kept his head steady, shuffled across, and swat-flic
full_text: Shami to Baard, , that is I0$! It's a half-volley alright, but he's kept his head steady, shuffled across, and swat-flicked this nonchalantly over deep mid-wicket for six!

short_text: Shami to Baard, no run, fuller length ball outside off, and that's driven firmly to mid-off
full_text: Shami to Baard, no run, fuller length ball outside off, and that's driven firmly to mid-off

short_text: Shami to Baard, , angles down leg-side once again, and that's a wide. India haven't started well...
full_text: Shami to Baard, , angles down leg-side once again, and that's a wide. India haven't started well...

short_text: Bumrah to Michael van Lingen, , that seemed to stick in the wicket, a slower short one by Bumrah at 115kmph, Michael van
full_text: Bumrah to Michael van Lingen, , that seemed to stick in the wicket, a slower short one by Bumrah at 115kmph, Michael van Lingen is early into the pull but gets enough on it to power it away through deep midwicket for four

short_text: Bumrah to Michael van Lingen, no run, back of a length ball on middle and leg, Michael van Lingen drags his backfoot int
full_text: Bumrah to Michael van Lingen, no run, back of a length ball on middle and leg, Michael van Lingen drags his backfoot into the on-side and works it towards square leg

short_text: Bumrah to Michael van Lingen, no run, good length ball angling away outside off, Michael van Lingen opens the face and s
full_text: Bumrah to Michael van Lingen, no run, good length ball angling away outside off, Michael van Lingen opens the face and slices this footlessly towards backward point

short_text: Bumrah to Michael van Lingen, , another full-toss on off-stump, unusual from Bumrah, and that's check-driven to long-off
full_text: Bumrah to Michael van Lingen, , another full-toss on off-stump, unusual from Bumrah, and that's check-driven to long-off for four

short_text: Bumrah to Baard, 1 run, the yorker swerves into the blockhole, and that's a thick inside edge into the pads towards the
full_text: Bumrah to Baard, 1 run, the yorker swerves into the blockhole, and that's a thick inside edge into the pads towards the off-side for a quick single

short_text: Bumrah to Michael van Lingen, leg byes, 1 run, dipping full-toss on leg, Michael van Lingen has a swat into the on-side
full_text: Bumrah to Michael van Lingen, leg byes, 1 run, dipping full-toss on leg, Michael van Lingen has a swat into the on-side but misses, and that's deflected away towards fine leg for a leg-bye

full_text: Shami to Michael van Lingen, 1 run, no width on this back of a length ball, and that's poked to point for a single

full_text: Shami to Baard, leg byes, 1 run, fuller length ball on the pads, Baard misses the flick, and that's deflected off the pads towards square leg for a leg-bye

short_text: Shami to Baard, no run, good length ball outside off, Baard opens the face and slices this towards backward point
full_text: Shami to Baard, no run, good length ball outside off, Baard opens the face and slices this towards backward point

short_text: Shami to Michael van Lingen, 1 run, short of length ball, not a lot of width, and that's carved away to third man for on
full_text: Shami to Michael van Lingen, 1 run, short of length ball, not a lot of width, and that's carved away to third man for one

short_text: Shami to Michael van Lingen, no run, fuller length ball on the stumps, check-driven towards mid-on but Shami cuts it off
full_text: Shami to Michael van Lingen, no run, fuller length ball on the stumps, check-driven towards mid-on but Shami cuts it off and hops across the danger area

full_text: Shami to Michael van Lingen, , a speedy one down leg, Pant dives across to cut that off as Michael van Lingen misses the flick

full_text: Shami to Baard, 1 run, fuller length ball swerving in towards off, Baard gets a thick outside edge towards square third man for one

short_text: Michael van Lingen to Rahul, , Rahul finishes the final rites, standing back to the slower one and flat-batting it strai
full_text: Michael van Lingen to Rahul, , Rahul finishes the final rites, standing back to the slower one and flat-batting it straight back past the bowler. No chance for mid-off

short_text: Michael van Lingen to Suryakumar Yadav, leg byes, 1 run, back of a length down the leg-side, Yadav can't get the leg gla
full_text: Michael van Lingen to Suryakumar Yadav, leg byes, 1 run, back of a length down the leg-side, Yadav can't get the leg glance away, deflected off the thigh towards short fine leg

short_text: Loftie-Eaton to Suryakumar Yadav, 1 run, full toss, slicy drive through extra cover and Yadav will keep strike
full_text: Loftie-Eaton to Suryakumar Yadav, 1 run, full toss, slicy drive through extra cover and Yadav will keep strike

short_text: Loftie-Eaton to Rahul, 1 run, slower and fuller, wristed away down to long-on. Another high class knock
full_text: Loftie-Eaton to Rahul, 1 run, slower and fuller, wristed away down to long-on. Another high class knock

short_text: Loftie-Eaton to Rahul, 2 runs, quicker and shorter, Rahul sits on the back foot and pulls it in between deep mid-wicket
full_text: Loftie-Eaton to Rahul, 2 runs, quicker and shorter, Rahul sits on the back foot and pulls it in between deep mid-wicket and long-on. A couple more. India just a boundary away

short_text: Loftie-Eaton to Suryakumar Yadav, 1 run, fuller and wider, Yadav reaches out and drives down to long-off
full_text: Loftie-Eaton to Suryakumar Yadav, 1 run, fuller and wider, Yadav reaches out and drives down to long-off

short_text: Loftie-Eaton to Suryakumar Yadav, no run, too full, on the pads but Yadav fails to connect the flick
full_text: Loftie-Eaton to Suryakumar Yadav, no run, too full, on the pads but Yadav fails to connect the flick

short_text: Loftie-Eaton to Suryakumar Yadav, , Yadav putting in the finishing touches with a flurry of boundaries. Width on offer,
full_text: Loftie-Eaton to Suryakumar Yadav, , Yadav putting in the finishing touches with a flurry of boundaries. Width on offer, fullish and he slices this away through backward point. Quick hands and it really whistled off the blade

short_text: Trumpelmann to Suryakumar Yadav, 1 run, Another well-directed short ball, tucks up Yadav on the pull and his bottom hand
full_text: Trumpelmann to Suryakumar Yadav, 1 run, Another well-directed short ball, tucks up Yadav on the pull and his bottom hand even comes off through the shot. Fortunate that it lands in no man's land

short_text: Trumpelmann to Suryakumar Yadav, , smashed! Slower, shorter and well outside off, Yadav had to really fetch this but he
full_text: Trumpelmann to Suryakumar Yadav, , smashed! Slower, shorter and well outside off, Yadav had to really fetch this but he was ready, setting himself for the pull shot over mid-wicket. Absolutely belted this

short_text: Trumpelmann to Suryakumar Yadav, no run, , Yadav was on the move across for the pull shot but this was so well-directed
full_text: Trumpelmann to Suryakumar Yadav, no run, , Yadav was on the move across for the pull shot but this was so well-directed that he had to bail out of the stroke

short_text: Trumpelmann to Rahul, 1 run, shortish and on the hips, Rahul searches for that drop-kick pull stroke of his but doesn't
full_text: Trumpelmann to Rahul, 1 run, shortish and on the hips, Rahul searches for that drop-kick pull stroke of his but doesn't quite get hold of it, mistimed down to fine leg

short_text: Trumpelmann to Rahul, , straight as an arrow! Trumpelmann overpitches, in the slot and Rahul dismisses it over the bowle
full_text: Trumpelmann to Rahul, , straight as an arrow! Trumpelmann overpitches, in the slot and Rahul dismisses it over the bowler's head with a clean loft. Through the line, sweetly struck

short_text: Trumpelmann to Suryakumar Yadav, 1 run, fuller and wider, angling across Yadav who square drives through backward point
full_text: Trumpelmann to Suryakumar Yadav, 1 run, fuller and wider, angling across Yadav who square drives through backward point

full_text: Loftie-Eaton to Rahul, no run, slower and fuller, Rahul lunges and nudges this to point

short_text: Loftie-Eaton to Suryakumar Yadav, 1 run, fuller and outside off, driven down to long-off
full_text: Loftie-Eaton to Suryakumar Yadav, 1 run, fuller and outside off, driven down to long-off

short_text: Loftie-Eaton to Suryakumar Yadav, no run, too wide and very full again, Yadav desperate on the slog sweep, misses
full_text: Loftie-Eaton to Suryakumar Yadav, no run, too wide and very full again, Yadav desperate on the slog sweep, misses

short_text: Loftie-Eaton to Suryakumar Yadav, no run, a bit too full for the sweep, Yadav tries though and gets it off the forearm,
full_text: Loftie-Eaton to Suryakumar Yadav, no run, a bit too full for the sweep, Yadav tries though and gets it off the forearm, to short third

short_text: Loftie-Eaton to Suryakumar Yadav, , This isn't a bad ball at all, just an innovative shot. Flatter one outside off, Yada
full_text: Loftie-Eaton to Suryakumar Yadav, , This isn't a bad ball at all, just an innovative shot. Flatter one outside off, Yadav was already across and scooped it fine down the leg-side. Just picked his spot there

short_text: Loftie-Eaton to Rahul, 1 run, shorter and wider, cut away to deep point
full_text: Loftie-Eaton to Rahul, 1 run, shorter and wider, cut away to deep point

short_text: Michael van Lingen to Suryakumar Yadav, no run, fuller and outside off, firmly driven but can't find the gap at extra co
full_text: Michael van Lingen to Suryakumar Yadav, no run, fuller and outside off, firmly driven but can't find the gap at extra cover

short_text: Michael van Lingen to Rahul, 1 run, slower and outside off, Rahul waits and cuts but can't beat short third man
full_text: Michael van Lingen to Rahul, 1 run, slower and outside off, Rahul waits and cuts but can't beat short third man

short_text: Michael van Lingen to Rahul, , Picked this from an off-stump line and whipped it over square leg. Uppish, but he split f
full_text: Michael van Lingen to Rahul, , Picked this from an off-stump line and whipped it over square leg. Uppish, but he split fine leg and deep mid-wicket with ease. Almost went all the way

short_text: Michael van Lingen to Rahul, 2 runs, shortish and a hint of width, Rahul rises on toes to play the back foot punch, just
full_text: Michael van Lingen to Rahul, 2 runs, shortish and a hint of width, Rahul rises on toes to play the back foot punch, just wide of mid-off who does well to track it down

short_text: Michael van Lingen to Suryakumar Yadav, 1 run, pitched right up, leg-lined and Yadav dishes out a sweetly-timed on-drive
full_text: Michael van Lingen to Suryakumar Yadav, 1 run, pitched right up, leg-lined and Yadav dishes out a sweetly-timed on-drive. Long-on is in place though, so just a single

short_text: Michael van Lingen to Rahul, 1 run, shortish and slanting across Rahul who cuts this away through the covers
full_text: Michael van Lingen to Rahul, 1 run, shortish and slanting across Rahul who cuts this away through the covers

short_text: Loftie-Eaton to Rahul, 1 run, flatter and leg lined, punched off the back foot, down to long-on
full_text: Loftie-Eaton to Rahul, 1 run, flatter and leg lined, punched off the back foot, down to long-on

short_text: Loftie-Eaton to Suryakumar Yadav, 1 run, does it again, another inside out shot but not as much timing. Sweeper was stra
full_text: Loftie-Eaton to Suryakumar Yadav, 1 run, does it again, another inside out shot but not as much timing. Sweeper was straighter too, so it meant just a single

short_text: Loftie-Eaton to Suryakumar Yadav, , this time to the right of Baard and he has no chance to get across. Fuller and wider
full_text: Loftie-Eaton to Suryakumar Yadav, , this time to the right of Baard and he has no chance to get across. Fuller and wider, Yadav leans into the inside out, his trademark shot and easily over extra cover

short_text: Loftie-Eaton to Suryakumar Yadav, 2 runs, short and too wide, Yadav slices it away wide of backward point. Seemed good e
full_text: Loftie-Eaton to Suryakumar Yadav, 2 runs, short and too wide, Yadav slices it away wide of backward point. Seemed good enough to reach the fence but it's the big part of the ground and Baard did well to get across to his left, saving a brace

short_text: Loftie-Eaton to Suryakumar Yadav, no run, slower and fuller, Yadav lunges and blocks
full_text: Loftie-Eaton to Suryakumar Yadav, no run, slower and fuller, Yadav lunges and blocks

short_text: Loftie-Eaton to Rahul, 1 run, skiddy drag-down on leg, Rahul swivels on the back foot to pull this away, no timing and g
full_text: Loftie-Eaton to Rahul, 1 run, skiddy drag-down on leg, Rahul swivels on the back foot to pull this away, no timing and gets it behind square leg

short_text: Jan Frylinck to Rahul, 1 run, 121kph, scythes this away-angler to deep backward point
full_text: Jan Frylinck to Rahul, 1 run, 121kph, scythes this away-angler to deep backward point

short_text: Jan Frylinck to Rohit, Caught by Zane Green!! The opening partnership has been broken! Slower ball on a full length at 1
full_text: Jan Frylinck to Rohit, Caught by Zane Green!! The opening partnership has been broken! Slower ball on a full length at 118kph, Rohit looks to slog it across the line and the ball lobs up a long way in the air off the outer edge. Zane Green - the man with the gloves - calls for it, settles under the skier and gathers it calmly after getting towards the point region.

short_text: Jan Frylinck to Rahul, 1 run, 122kph, pulled hard to deep mid-wicket
full_text: Jan Frylinck to Rahul, 1 run, 122kph, pulled hard to deep mid-wicket

short_text: Jan Frylinck to Rahul, , 120kph, superb pick-up shot! It was bowled on the pads, Rahul slightly bent both his legs and h
full_text: Jan Frylinck to Rahul, , 120kph, superb pick-up shot! It was bowled on the pads, Rahul slightly bent both his legs and helped it on its way over fine leg. Goes all the way. Swung and swung hard

short_text: Jan Frylinck to Rohit, 1 run, back of a length wide of off, Rohit stays back to dap it square of the wicket
full_text: Jan Frylinck to Rohit, 1 run, back of a length wide of off, Rohit stays back to dap it square of the wicket

full_text: Jan Frylinck to Rahul, 1 run, 117kph, short of length, Rahul miscues the heave off the inner edge. A single to deep mid-wicket

short_text: Loftie-Eaton to Rahul, 1 run, 87kph, Rahul moves leg-side to drive this full ball to long-off
full_text: Loftie-Eaton to Rahul, 1 run, 87kph, Rahul moves leg-side to drive this full ball to long-off

full_text: Loftie-Eaton to Rohit, 1 run, 86kph, airy ball, in-drifter, eased to long-on

short_text: Loftie-Eaton to Rohit, , 93kph, flatter ball, Rohit comes down the track, reaches out to get under this wide-ish ball an
full_text: Loftie-Eaton to Rohit, , 93kph, flatter ball, Rohit comes down the track, reaches out to get under this wide-ish ball and thumps it over the bowler's head. No need to run for those

short_text: Loftie-Eaton to Rohit, no run, 85kph, another flighted ball, drops again as it gets close to the batter, Rohit squeezes
full_text: Loftie-Eaton to Rohit, no run, 85kph, another flighted ball, drops again as it gets close to the batter, Rohit squeezes it out

short_text: Loftie-Eaton to Rohit, no run, 86kpg, tossed up ball, dips, Rohit brings his bat down to jam it out
full_text: Loftie-Eaton to Rohit, no run, 86kpg, tossed up ball, dips, Rohit brings his bat down to jam it out

full_text: Loftie-Eaton to Rahul, 1 run, 91kph, Rahul rocks back and punches the leggie to long-off

short_text: Smit to Rahul, 1 run, 118kph, Rahul knocks one down to long-on
full_text: Smit to Rahul, 1 run, 118kph, Rahul knocks one down to long-on

short_text: Smit to Rohit, 1 run, Second in three matches. 127kph, low full toss, clipped over vacant mid-wicket for a single
full_text: Smit to Rohit, 1 run, Second in three matches. 127kph, low full toss, clipped over vacant mid-wicket for a single

short_text: Smit to Rohit, no run, 122kph, fuller and wider, Rohit moves across and gets low to scoop/sweep, connects with thin air
full_text: Smit to Rohit, no run, 122kph, fuller and wider, Rohit moves across and gets low to scoop/sweep, connects with thin air

full_text: Smit to Rohit, no run, 128kph, Rohit is off-balance as he clips and inside-edges onto his pad. The ball dies down adjacent to the pitch on the off-side

short_text: Smit to Rohit, , 128kph, poor line. Strays the length ball on the pads and it's too easy for Rohit who glances it fine o
full_text: Smit to Rohit, , 128kph, poor line. Strays the length ball on the pads and it's too easy for Rohit who glances it fine of the short fine leg fielder

short_text: Smit to Rahul, 1 run, 121kph, angled in from round the wicket, Rahul punches to long-on
full_text: Smit to Rahul, 1 run, 121kph, angled in from round the wicket, Rahul punches to long-on

short_text: Jan Frylinck to Rohit, , 106kph, spoils the over for Jan Frylinck. The slower ones became too predictable. Rohit waits,
full_text: Jan Frylinck to Rohit, , 106kph, spoils the over for Jan Frylinck. The slower ones became too predictable. Rohit waits, crouches a bit and pulls it square of the man at 45. No chance for the long leg fielder to cut it off

short_text: Jan Frylinck to Rahul, 1 run, 115kph, short of length, punched to long-on
full_text: Jan Frylinck to Rahul, 1 run, 115kph, short of length, punched to long-on

short_text: Jan Frylinck to Rohit, 1 run, 121kph, off-pace short ball, Rohit waits and waits to pull it to backward square leg
full_text: Jan Frylinck to Rohit, 1 run, 121kph, off-pace short ball, Rohit waits and waits to pull it to backward square leg

short_text: Jan Frylinck to Rahul, 1 run, 119kph, shortish ball that comes slower than Rahul expects it to. He was on the walk befor
full_text: Jan Frylinck to Rahul, 1 run, 119kph, shortish ball that comes slower than Rahul expects it to. He was on the walk before pulling it to deep mid-wicket. The fielder takes it on the bounce

short_text: Jan Frylinck to Rohit, 1 run, 119kph, Frylinck pulls his length back, tucked away to square leg
full_text: Jan Frylinck to Rohit, 1 run, 119kph, Frylinck pulls his length back, tucked away to square leg

full_text: Jan Frylinck to Rahul, 1 run, 118kph, pad-lined ball from round the wicket, clipped uppishly through mid-wicket

short_text: Smit to Rahul, 1 run, 122kph, turns this fullish ball in front of square on the leg-side for a single
full_text: Smit to Rahul, 1 run, 122kph, turns this fullish ball in front of square on the leg-side for a single

short_text: Smit to Rahul, 2 runs, 121kph, the bottom hand comes off the bat handle and he ends up slicing it over the in-field - ov
full_text: Smit to Rahul, 2 runs, 121kph, the bottom hand comes off the bat handle and he ends up slicing it over the in-field - over cover. Was a full ball outside off and Rahul was early to throw his arms at it

short_text: Smit to Rohit, 1 run, comes down the track and flicks, inside-halved to deep mid-wicket
full_text: Smit to Rohit, 1 run, comes down the track and flicks, inside-halved to deep mid-wicket

short_text: Smit to Rahul, 1 run, turns this short of length ball to mid-wicket and the single brings up the
full_text: Smit to Rahul, 1 run, turns this short of length ball to mid-wicket and the single brings up the

short_text: Smit to Rahul, , 123kph, shot! Once again, quick hands from Rahul as he flays this length ball through cover point. Wait
full_text: Smit to Rahul, , 123kph, shot! Once again, quick hands from Rahul as he flays this length ball through cover point. Waited for it on the back foot and freed his arms to place it in the gap

short_text: Smit to Rohit, 1 run, 124kph, round the wicket, full on middle and leg, flicked away to deep square leg
full_text: Smit to Rohit, 1 run, 124kph, round the wicket, full on middle and leg, flicked away to deep square leg

short_text: Scholtz to Rohit, 1 run, 89kph, Rohit will keep the strike. Pushes this in-angler to mid-wicket off the inner half.
full_text: Scholtz to Rohit, 1 run, 89kph, Rohit will keep the strike. Pushes this in-angler to mid-wicket off the inner half.

short_text: Scholtz to Rohit, no run, brave from the bowler. Another flighted delivery, Rohit looks to flog across the line and insi
full_text: Scholtz to Rohit, no run, brave from the bowler. Another flighted delivery, Rohit looks to flog across the line and inside-edges onto his pad

short_text: Scholtz to Rohit, , 86kph, Scholtz tosses it up on this occasion. Rohit shimmies down, gets close to the pitch of the ba
full_text: Scholtz to Rohit, , 86kph, Scholtz tosses it up on this occasion. Rohit shimmies down, gets close to the pitch of the ball and lofts it high and over long-on. Superb timing

short_text: Scholtz to Rohit, no run, 92kph, fuller and closer to off, Rohit is half-forward to push. Off the inner edge and rolls b
full_text: Scholtz to Rohit, no run, 92kph, fuller and closer to off, Rohit is half-forward to push. Off the inner edge and rolls back to Scholtz

short_text: Scholtz to Rohit, , 96kph, width served outside off, the length is on the shorter side as well. Rohit flays the cut thro
full_text: Scholtz to Rohit, , 96kph, width served outside off, the length is on the shorter side as well. Rohit flays the cut through point

short_text: Scholtz to Rohit, no run, loud appeal for lbw as Rohit misses the sweep. Namibia take their time and send it upstairs. I
full_text: Scholtz to Rohit, no run, loud appeal for lbw as Rohit misses the sweep. Namibia take their time and send it upstairs. In-drifter from round the wicket and Rohit got down to sweep. Missed and got hit on the arm. UltraEdge confirms that there was no bat. and the on-field call stays. The ball spun a bit and there was bounce too. Namibia lose a review

short_text: Wiese to Rahul, no run, four dots after the six! A slower ball to end the over and Rahul punches it back to Wiese off th
full_text: Wiese to Rahul, no run, four dots after the six! A slower ball to end the over and Rahul punches it back to Wiese off the inner edge

short_text: Wiese to Rahul, no run, 132kph, quicker, in-slanter, Rahul is late on his flick/glance, hits him high on the pad and rol
full_text: Wiese to Rahul, no run, 132kph, quicker, in-slanter, Rahul is late on his flick/glance, hits him high on the pad and rolls to short third man

short_text: Wiese to Rahul, no run, 104kph, another off-pace ball, knuckle ball, Rahul stands tall in an attempt to slap it through
full_text: Wiese to Rahul, no run, 104kph, another off-pace ball, knuckle ball, Rahul stands tall in an attempt to slap it through the off-side. The ball scoots under his bat

short_text: Wiese to Rahul, no run, 105kph, slower ball, well wide outside off, Rahul chops it to point
full_text: Wiese to Rahul, no run, 105kph, slower ball, well wide outside off, Rahul chops it to point

short_text: Wiese to Rahul, , 133kph, wow! Quick hands from KL. Length ball angled in, Rahul stands tall and short-arm-jabs the pull
full_text: Wiese to Rahul, , 133kph, wow! Quick hands from KL. Length ball angled in, Rahul stands tall and short-arm-jabs the pull to send it over deep mid-wicket. 82m six! Right off the meat of the bat. Stand and deliver!

short_text: Wiese to Rohit, 1 run, 128kph, in-slanting length ball, nudged in front of mid-wicket for a quick single. The fielder at
full_text: Wiese to Rohit, 1 run, 128kph, in-slanting length ball, nudged in front of mid-wicket for a quick single. The fielder attacks the ball but fails to pick it up cleanly

short_text: Trumpelmann to Rohit, 1 run, 129kph, short and into the body, Rohit pulls hard and hits flat, deep backward square leg t
full_text: Trumpelmann to Rohit, 1 run, 129kph, short and into the body, Rohit pulls hard and hits flat, deep backward square leg takes it on the bounce

short_text: Trumpelmann to Rohit, 2 runs, 123kph, slower ball, Rohit clears his front leg and hacks across the line, gets it past th
full_text: Trumpelmann to Rohit, 2 runs, 123kph, slower ball, Rohit clears his front leg and hacks across the line, gets it past the diving mid-wicket fielder. Long-on sprints and fumbles a bit but it isn't costly

short_text: Trumpelmann to Rohit, 2 runs, 136kph, fuller length, Rohit shimmies down and flicks it wide and over mid-on. The fielder
full_text: Trumpelmann to Rohit, 2 runs, 136kph, fuller length, Rohit shimmies down and flicks it wide and over mid-on. The fielder - Erasmus - runs back, slides and makes a tumbling stop to keep the batters down to two

short_text: Trumpelmann to Rohit, no run, 124kph, Trumpelmann switches to round the wicket and bowls a slower ball into the pitch. R
full_text: Trumpelmann to Rohit, no run, 124kph, Trumpelmann switches to round the wicket and bowls a slower ball into the pitch. Rohit miscues the pull and it falls short of the forward-diving mid-wicket fielder

short_text: Trumpelmann to Rohit, no run, inswinger, very full, Rohit brings his bat down in time to push it back to Trumpelmann
full_text: Trumpelmann to Rohit, no run, inswinger, very full, Rohit brings his bat down in time to push it back to Trumpelmann

short_text: Trumpelmann to Rohit, , 130kph, smashed through the line. Fuller than good length, wide of off, no real movement, Rohit
full_text: Trumpelmann to Rohit, , 130kph, smashed through the line. Fuller than good length, wide of off, no real movement, Rohit thumps it downtown. Swings hard and batters it straight of mid-off. Made it look so easy.

short_text: Wiese to Rohit, 1 run, 131kph, fuller than good length outside off, Rohit uses the bowler's pace and width to dab it to
full_text: Wiese to Rohit, 1 run, 131kph, fuller than good length outside off, Rohit uses the bowler's pace and width to dab it to third man

short_text: Wiese to Rohit, , 130kph, angled in on leg, Rohit gets inside the line and helps it on its way over fine leg for a 74m s
full_text: Wiese to Rohit, , 130kph, angled in on leg, Rohit gets inside the line and helps it on its way over fine leg for a 74m six!

short_text: Wiese to Rohit, no run, 131kph, in the air ... and ... safe! Rohit goes hard on the pull, the bottom hand comes off and
full_text: Wiese to Rohit, no run, 131kph, in the air ... and ... safe! Rohit goes hard on the pull, the bottom hand comes off and the timing's horrible. Lobs up off the top-edge and falls well short of mid-on

short_text: Wiese to Rohit, , 127kph, Rohit takes the aerial route. Moves leg-side, waits for this short of length ball to come to h
full_text: Wiese to Rohit, , 127kph, Rohit takes the aerial route. Moves leg-side, waits for this short of length ball to come to him and elevates it over wide mid-off. Not quite off the middle, but enough wood to clear the man inside the 30-yard circle

short_text: Wiese to Rohit, no run, 125kph, on a length and around off, defended back to Wiese
full_text: Wiese to Rohit, no run, 125kph, on a length and around off, defended back to Wiese

short_text: Wiese to Rohit, no run, 130kph, short of length, turned to mid-wicket
full_text: Wiese to Rohit, no run, 130kph, short of length, turned to mid-wicket

short_text: Trumpelmann to Rahul, no run, 130kph, fuller and wider, Rahul leans and push-drives but straight to cover. Good first ov
full_text: Trumpelmann to Rahul, no run, 130kph, fuller and wider, Rahul leans and push-drives but straight to cover. Good first over from Trumpelmann, deserved a wicket

short_text: Trumpelmann to Rahul, no run, hint of inward shape from a good length, Rahul watchfully defends from the crease
full_text: Trumpelmann to Rahul, no run, hint of inward shape from a good length, Rahul watchfully defends from the crease

short_text: Trumpelmann to Rohit, 1 run, leg-lined, worked around the corner
full_text: Trumpelmann to Rohit, 1 run, leg-lined, worked around the corner

short_text: Trumpelmann to Rohit, , 134kph, Back of a length on the ribs, Rohit casually plays a one-legged fine-pull and almost pay
full_text: Trumpelmann to Rohit, , 134kph, Back of a length on the ribs, Rohit casually plays a one-legged fine-pull and almost pays the price. The man at 45 - van Lingen -  dives forward and it's a pretty straightforward chance. Not only does the fielder put it down but also lets it go to the fine leg fence. Oh dear!

short_text: Trumpelmann to Rohit, no run, 132kph, fullish and wider, Rohit plays for the swing and ends up getting on the outside ed
full_text: Trumpelmann to Rohit, no run, 132kph, fullish and wider, Rohit plays for the swing and ends up getting on the outside edge

short_text: Trumpelmann to Rahul, 1 run, 134kph, there's swing, but Rahul is well equipped to counter that. Walks forward and across
full_text: Trumpelmann to Rahul, 1 run, 134kph, there's swing, but Rahul is well equipped to counter that. Walks forward and across before clipping this full ball with the swing to deep square leg
